examples: "That is beautiful, Tony," Momma said, no longer sounding at all snappish.
"A whole nation of belligerent, snappish people?" asked Nikolai.
That is beautiful, Tony, "Momma said, no longer sounding at all snappish."
Edward Reeve stayed inside and tried to teach parlor tricks to his snappish pet ferret with white crumbles of Yorkshire cheese.
